Package org.eventb.internal.core.preferences

Class TacticProfileContributions

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.preferences.TacticProfileContributions
public class TacticProfileContributions extends Object
Loads and manages tactic profiles contributed through extension point org.eventb.core.tacticProfiles.
